note: RMSF values are in relative units (normalized to mean=1.0). ANM spring constant γ is set uniformly; absolute magnitudes are not comparable to MD-RMSF in Å. Fold-change and DCCM values are γ-independent.

aoh_pocket_analysis.interpretation: Pocket residues show elevated flexibility vs background (fold-change 1.16×). This is consistent with the site being a cryptic pocket — intrinsically flexible in the apo state.
aoh_pocket_analysis.dccm_interpretation: Positive internal DCCM among AOH1996 pocket residues — residues move coherently, consistent with a collective opening motion.
